xmldoc.message:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<Model>
  <!--SPEC-->
  <Command Name="spec" IsBranch="true" 
Settings="Spectre.Console.Cli.CommandSettings">
    <Description>Commands for working with OpenAPI specification 
files.</Description>
    <!--VALIDATE-->
    <Command Name="validate" IsBranch="false" 
ClrType="Atc.Rest.Api.CliGenerator.Commands.SpecValidateCommand" 
Settings="Atc.Rest.Api.CliGenerator.Commands.Settings.SpecValidateCommandSetting
s">
      <Description>Validate an OpenAPI specification file (strict mode by 
default).</Description>
      <Parameters>
        <Option Short="" Long="files" Value="LIST" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Explicit comma-separated list of files to validate as 
multi-part (overrides auto-discovery).</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="multi-part" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Enable multi-part mode: auto-discover and merge part 
files before validation.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="no-strict" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Disable strict validation mode (skip additional naming 
convention checks).</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="s" Long="specification" Value="PATH" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Path to the OpenAPI specification file (YAML or 
JSON).</Description>
        </Option>
      </Parameters>
      <Examples>
        <Example commandLine="spec" />
        <Example commandLine="validate" />
        <Example commandLine="-s" />
        <Example commandLine="api.yaml" />
        <Example commandLine="spec" />
        <Example commandLine="validate" />
        <Example commandLine="-s" />
        <Example commandLine="api.yaml" />
        <Example commandLine="--no-strict" />
        <Example commandLine="spec" />
        <Example commandLine="validate" />
        <Example commandLine="-s" />
        <Example commandLine="api.yaml" />
        <Example commandLine="--multi-part" />
        <Example commandLine="spec" />
        <Example commandLine="validate" />
        <Example commandLine="--files" />
        <Example commandLine="api.yaml,api_Users.yaml,api_Orders.yaml" />
      </Examples>
    </Command>
    <!--MERGE-->
    <Command Name="merge" IsBranch="false" 
ClrType="Atc.Rest.Api.CliGenerator.Commands.SpecMergeCommand" 
Settings="Atc.Rest.Api.CliGenerator.Commands.Settings.SpecMergeCommandSettings">
      <Description>Merge multiple OpenAPI specification files into 
one.</Description>
      <Parameters>
        <Option Short="" Long="files" Value="LIST" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Explicit comma-separated list of files to merge 
(overrides auto-discovery).</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="format" Value="FORMAT" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Output format: yaml (default) or json.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="o" Long="output" Value="PATH" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Output file path for the merged 
specification.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="preview" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Preview merged output without writing file.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="s" Long="specification" Value="PATH" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Path to the base OpenAPI specification file 
(auto-discovers part files by naming convention).</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="strategy" Value="STRATEGY" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Merge strategy for duplicates: ErrorOnDuplicate 
(default), MergeIfIdentical, AppendUnique, FirstWins, LastWins.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="validate" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Validate the merged specification after 
merging.</Description>
        </Option>
      </Parameters>
      <Examples>
        <Example commandLine="spec" />
        <Example commandLine="merge" />
        <Example commandLine="-s" />
        <Example commandLine="api.yaml" />
        <Example commandLine="-o" />
        <Example commandLine="merged.yaml" />
        <Example commandLine="spec" />
        <Example commandLine="merge" />
        <Example commandLine="-s" />
        <Example commandLine="api.yaml" />
        <Example commandLine="-o" />
        <Example commandLine="merged.yaml" />
        <Example commandLine="--validate" />
        <Example commandLine="spec" />
        <Example commandLine="merge" />
        <Example commandLine="--files" />
        <Example commandLine="api.yaml,api_Users.yaml,api_Orders.yaml" />
        <Example commandLine="-o" />
        <Example commandLine="merged.yaml" />
        <Example commandLine="spec" />
        <Example commandLine="merge" />
        <Example commandLine="-s" />
        <Example commandLine="api.yaml" />
        <Example commandLine="--preview" />
      </Examples>
    </Command>
    <!--SPLIT-->
    <Command Name="split" IsBranch="false" 
ClrType="Atc.Rest.Api.CliGenerator.Commands.SpecSplitCommand" 
Settings="Atc.Rest.Api.CliGenerator.Commands.Settings.SpecSplitCommandSettings">
      <Description>Split an OpenAPI specification file into multiple part 
files.</Description>
      <Parameters>
        <Option Short="" Long="extract-common" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Extract shared schemas to a Common file.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="min-operations" Value="N" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.Int32">
          <Description>Minimum operations per part file (smaller groups merged 
into Other).</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="o" Long="output" Value="PATH" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Output directory for the split files.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="pattern" Value="PATTERN" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>File naming pattern. Default: 
{base}_{part}.yaml</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="preview" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Preview split without writing files.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="s" Long="specification" Value="PATH" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Path to the OpenAPI specification file to 
split.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="strategy" Value="STRATEGY" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Split strategy: ByTag (default), ByPathSegment, or 
ByDomain.</Description>
        </Option>
      </Parameters>
      <Examples>
        <Example commandLine="spec" />
        <Example commandLine="split" />
        <Example commandLine="-s" />
        <Example commandLine="api.yaml" />
        <Example commandLine="-o" />
        <Example commandLine="./parts" />
        <Example commandLine="spec" />
        <Example commandLine="split" />
        <Example commandLine="-s" />
        <Example commandLine="api.yaml" />
        <Example commandLine="-o" />
        <Example commandLine="./parts" />
        <Example commandLine="--strategy" />
        <Example commandLine="ByPathSegment" />
        <Example commandLine="spec" />
        <Example commandLine="split" />
        <Example commandLine="-s" />
        <Example commandLine="api.yaml" />
        <Example commandLine="-o" />
        <Example commandLine="./parts" />
        <Example commandLine="--extract-common" />
        <Example commandLine="spec" />
        <Example commandLine="split" />
        <Example commandLine="-s" />
        <Example commandLine="api.yaml" />
        <Example commandLine="--preview" />
      </Examples>
    </Command>
  </Command>
  <!--GENERATE-->
  <Command Name="generate" IsBranch="true" 
Settings="Spectre.Console.Cli.CommandSettings">
    <Description>Commands for generating code from OpenAPI 
specifications.</Description>
    <!--CLIENT-->
    <Command Name="client" IsBranch="false" 
ClrType="Atc.Rest.Api.CliGenerator.Commands.GenerateClientCommand" 
Settings="Atc.Rest.Api.CliGenerator.Commands.Settings.GenerateClientCommandSetti
ngs">
      <Description>Generate a client project from an OpenAPI specification 
(strict validation by default).</Description>
      <Parameters>
        <Option Short="" Long="client-namespace" Value="NAMESPACE" 
Required="false" Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Override the client namespace (written to marker 
file).</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="client-project" Value="NAME" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Override the client project name.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="client-suffix" Value="SUFFIX" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Suffix for the HTTP client class name (default: 
'Client').</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="generation-mode" Value="MODE" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Client generation mode: TypedClient or 
EndpointPerOperation.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="include-deprecated" Value="NULL" Required="false"
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Include deprecated operations and schemas in generated 
code.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="n" Long="name" Value="NAME" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Name of the project (e.g., 
'Demo.Api.Contracts').</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="namespace" Value="NAMESPACE" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Custom namespace prefix for generated code (auto-detected
from project name if not specified).</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="no-oauth" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Disable OAuth2 token management generation even when 
OAuth2 security is detected.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="no-strict" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Disable strict validation mode (skip additional naming 
convention checks).</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="options" Value="PATH" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Path to ApiGeneratorOptions.json file (optional, 
auto-discovered if not specified).</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="o" Long="output" Value="PATH" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Path to the output directory for the generated 
project.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="report" Value="NULL" Required="false" Kind="flag"
ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Generate a .generation-report.md file in the output 
directory.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="s" Long="specification" Value="PATH" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Path to the OpenAPI specification file (YAML or 
JSON).</Description>
        </Option>
      </Parameters>
      <Examples>
        <Example commandLine="generate" />
        <Example commandLine="client" />
        <Example commandLine="-s" />
        <Example commandLine="api.yaml" />
        <Example commandLine="-o" />
        <Example commandLine="output/MyApp.Client" />
        <Example commandLine="-n" />
        <Example commandLine="MyApp.Client" />
        <Example commandLine="generate" />
        <Example commandLine="client" />
        <Example commandLine="-s" />
        <Example commandLine="api.yaml" />
        <Example commandLine="-o" />
        <Example commandLine="output/MyApp.Client" />
        <Example commandLine="-n" />
        <Example commandLine="MyApp.Client" />
        <Example commandLine="--no-strict" />
      </Examples>
    </Command>
    <!--SERVER-->
    <Command Name="server" IsBranch="false" 
ClrType="Atc.Rest.Api.CliGenerator.Commands.GenerateServerCommand" 
Settings="Atc.Rest.Api.CliGenerator.Commands.Settings.GenerateServerCommandSetti
ngs">
      <Description>Generate server contracts and domain handler scaffolds from 
an OpenAPI specification.</Description>
      <Parameters>
        <Option Short="" Long="aspire" Value="NULL" Required="false" Kind="flag"
ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Create an Aspire AppHost project for 
orchestration.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="contracts-namespace" Value="NAMESPACE" 
Required="false" Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Override the contracts namespace (written to marker 
file).</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="contracts-project" Value="NAME" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Override the contracts project name.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="default-api-version" Value="VERSION" 
Required="false" Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Default API version (e.g., '1.0').</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="domain-namespace" Value="NAMESPACE" 
Required="false" Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Override the domain namespace (written to marker 
file).</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="domain-output" Value="PATH" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Output path for domain handler scaffolds 
(TwoProjects/TreeProjects mode only).</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="domain-project" Value="NAME" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Override the domain project name 
(TwoProjects/TreeProjects mode only).</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="handler-suffix" Value="SUFFIX" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Suffix for handler class names (default: 
'Handler').</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="host-namespace" Value="NAMESPACE" 
Required="false" Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Override the host namespace.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="host-project" Value="NAME" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Override the host project name (TreeProjects mode 
only).</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="host-ui" Value="TYPE" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>API documentation UI: None, Swagger, or Scalar 
(default).</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="host-ui-mode" Value="MODE" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>When to enable host UI: DevelopmentOnly (default) or 
Always.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="include-deprecated" Value="NULL" Required="false"
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Include deprecated operations and schemas in generated 
code.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="n" Long="name" Value="NAME" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Name of the project (e.g., 
'Demo.Api.Contracts').</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="namespace" Value="NAMESPACE" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Custom namespace prefix for generated code (auto-detected
from project name if not specified).</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="no-coding-rules" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Skip adding ATC coding rules updater files (added by 
default).</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="no-strict" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Disable strict validation mode (skip additional naming 
convention checks).</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="options" Value="PATH" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Path to ApiGeneratorOptions.json file (optional, 
auto-discovered if not specified).</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="o" Long="output" Value="PATH" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Path to the output directory for the generated 
project.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="project-structure" Value="TYPE" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Project structure: SingleProject (1 project), TwoProjects
(Host+Contracts, Domain), or TreeProjects (3 projects, default).</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="report" Value="NULL" Required="false" Kind="flag"
ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Generate a .generation-report.md file in the output 
directory.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="s" Long="specification" Value="PATH" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Path to the OpenAPI specification file (YAML or 
JSON).</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="stub-implementation" Value="TYPE" 
Required="false" Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Stub implementation type: throw-not-implemented, 
error-501, or default-value.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="sub-folder-strategy" Value="STRATEGY" 
Required="false" Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Sub-folder organization strategy: None, FirstPathSegment,
or OpenApiTag.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="versioning-strategy" Value="STRATEGY" 
Required="false" Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>API versioning strategy: None, QueryString, Header, 
UrlSegment, or Combined.</Description>
        </Option>
      </Parameters>
      <Examples>
        <Example commandLine="generate" />
        <Example commandLine="server" />
        <Example commandLine="-s" />
        <Example commandLine="api.yaml" />
        <Example commandLine="-o" />
        <Example commandLine="output/MyApp.Api.Contracts" />
        <Example commandLine="-n" />
        <Example commandLine="MyApp.Api.Contracts" />
        <Example commandLine="generate" />
        <Example commandLine="server" />
        <Example commandLine="-s" />
        <Example commandLine="api.yaml" />
        <Example commandLine="-o" />
        <Example commandLine="output/MyApp.Api.Contracts" />
        <Example commandLine="-n" />
        <Example commandLine="MyApp.Api.Contracts" />
        <Example commandLine="--no-domain" />
        <Example commandLine="generate" />
        <Example commandLine="server" />
        <Example commandLine="-s" />
        <Example commandLine="api.yaml" />
        <Example commandLine="-o" />
        <Example commandLine="output/MyApp.Api.Contracts" />
        <Example commandLine="-n" />
        <Example commandLine="MyApp.Api.Contracts" />
        <Example commandLine="--versioning-strategy" />
        <Example commandLine="UrlSegment" />
      </Examples>
    </Command>
  </Command>
  <!--OPTIONS-->
  <Command Name="options" IsBranch="true" 
Settings="Spectre.Console.Cli.CommandSettings">
    <Description>Commands for managing ApiGeneratorOptions.json configuration 
files.</Description>
    <!--CREATE-->
    <Command Name="create" IsBranch="false" 
ClrType="Atc.Rest.Api.CliGenerator.Commands.OptionsCreateCommand" 
Settings="Atc.Rest.Api.CliGenerator.Commands.Settings.OptionsCommandSettings">

install.stdout:
You can invoke the tool using the following command: atc-rest-api-gen
Tool 'atc-rest-api-gen' (version '1.0.9') was successfully installed.

        <Option Short="" Long="pattern" Value="PATTERN" Required="false"

Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Preview split without writing files.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="s" Long="specification" Value="PATH" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Path to the OpenAPI specification file to 
split.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="strategy" Value="STRATEGY" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Split strategy: ByTag (default), ByPathSegment, or 
ByDomain.</Description>
        </Option>
      </Parameters>
      <Examples>
        <Example commandLine="spec" />
        <Example commandLine="split" />
        <Example commandLine="-s" />
        <Example commandLine="api.yaml" />
        <Example commandLine="-o" />
        <Example commandLine="./parts" />
        <Example commandLine="spec" />

  <!--GENERATE-->
  <Command Name="generate" IsBranch="true" 
Settings="Spectre.Console.Cli.CommandSettings">
    <Description>Commands for generating code from OpenAPI 
specifications.</Description>
    <!--CLIENT-->
    <Command Name="client" IsBranch="false" 
ClrType="Atc.Rest.Api.CliGenerator.Commands.GenerateClientCommand" 
Settings="Atc.Rest.Api.CliGenerator.Commands.Settings.GenerateClientCommandSetti
ngs">
      <Description>Generate a client project from an OpenAPI specification 
(strict validation by default).</Description>
      <Parameters>
        <Option Short="" Long="client-namespace" Value="NAMESPACE" 
Required="false" Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Override the client namespace (written to marker 
file).</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="client-project" Value="NAME" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Override the client project name.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="client-suffix" Value="SUFFIX" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Suffix for the HTTP client class name (default: 
'Client').</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="generation-mode" Value="MODE" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Client generation mode: TypedClient or 
EndpointPerOperation.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="include-deprecated" Value="NULL" Required="false"
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Include deprecated operations and schemas in generated 
code.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="n" Long="name" Value="NAME" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Name of the project (e.g., 
'Demo.Api.Contracts').</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="namespace" Value="NAMESPACE" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Custom namespace prefix for generated code (auto-detected
from project name if not specified).</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="no-oauth" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Disable OAuth2 token management generation even when 
OAuth2 security is detected.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="no-strict" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Disable strict validation mode (skip additional naming 
convention checks).</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="options" Value="PATH" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Path to ApiGeneratorOptions.json file (optional, 
auto-discovered if not specified).</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="o" Long="output" Value="PATH" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Path to the output directory for the generated 
project.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="report" Value="NULL" Required="false" Kind="flag"
ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Generate a .generation-report.md file in the output 
directory.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="s" Long="specification" Value="PATH" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Path to the OpenAPI specification file (YAML or 
JSON).</Description>
        </Option>
      </Parameters>
      <Examples>
        <Example commandLine="generate" />
        <Example commandLine="client" />
        <Example commandLine="-s" />
        <Example commandLine="api.yaml" />
        <Example commandLine="-o" />
        <Example commandLine="output/MyApp.Client" />
        <Example commandLine="-n" />
        <Example commandLine="MyApp.Client" />
        <Example commandLine="generate" />
        <Example commandLine="client" />
        <Example commandLine="-s" />
        <Example commandLine="api.yaml" />
        <Example commandLine="-o" />
        <Example commandLine="output/MyApp.Client" />
        <Example commandLine="-n" />
        <Example commandLine="MyApp.Client" />
        <Example commandLine="--no-strict" />
      </Examples>
    </Command>
    <!--SERVER-->
    <Command Name="server" IsBranch="false" 
ClrType="Atc.Rest.Api.CliGenerator.Commands.GenerateServerCommand" 
Settings="Atc.Rest.Api.CliGenerator.Commands.Settings.GenerateServerCommandSetti
ngs">
      <Description>Generate server contracts and domain handler scaffolds from 
an OpenAPI specification.</Description>
      <Parameters>
        <Option Short="" Long="aspire" Value="NULL" Required="false" Kind="flag"
ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Create an Aspire AppHost project for 
orchestration.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="contracts-namespace" Value="NAMESPACE" 
Required="false" Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Override the contracts namespace (written to marker 
file).</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="contracts-project" Value="NAME" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Override the contracts project name.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="default-api-version" Value="VERSION" 
Required="false" Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Default API version (e.g., '1.0').</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="domain-namespace" Value="NAMESPACE" 
Required="false" Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Override the domain namespace (written to marker 
file).</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="domain-output" Value="PATH" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Output path for domain handler scaffolds 
(TwoProjects/TreeProjects mode only).</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="domain-project" Value="NAME" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Override the domain project name 
(TwoProjects/TreeProjects mode only).</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="handler-suffix" Value="SUFFIX" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Suffix for handler class names (default: 
'Handler').</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="host-namespace" Value="NAMESPACE" 
Required="false" Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Override the host namespace.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="host-project" Value="NAME" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Override the host project name (TreeProjects mode 
only).</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="host-ui" Value="TYPE" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>API documentation UI: None, Swagger, or Scalar 
(default).</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="host-ui-mode" Value="MODE" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>When to enable host UI: DevelopmentOnly (default) or 
Always.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="include-deprecated" Value="NULL" Required="false"
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Include deprecated operations and schemas in generated 
code.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="n" Long="name" Value="NAME" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Name of the project (e.g., 
'Demo.Api.Contracts').</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="namespace" Value="NAMESPACE" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Custom namespace prefix for generated code (auto-detected
from project name if not specified).</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="no-coding-rules" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Skip adding ATC coding rules updater files (added by 
default).</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="no-strict" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Disable strict validation mode (skip additional naming 
convention checks).</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="options" Value="PATH" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Path to ApiGeneratorOptions.json file (optional, 
auto-discovered if not specified).</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="o" Long="output" Value="PATH" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Path to the output directory for the generated 
project.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="project-structure" Value="TYPE" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Project structure: SingleProject (1 project), TwoProjects
(Host+Contracts, Domain), or TreeProjects (3 projects, default).</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="report" Value="NULL" Required="false" Kind="flag"
ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Generate a .generation-report.md file in the output 
directory.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="s" Long="specification" Value="PATH" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Path to the OpenAPI specification file (YAML or 
JSON).</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="stub-implementation" Value="TYPE" 
Required="false" Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Stub implementation type: throw-not-implemented, 
error-501, or default-value.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="sub-folder-strategy" Value="STRATEGY" 
Required="false" Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Sub-folder organization strategy: None, FirstPathSegment,
or OpenApiTag.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="versioning-strategy" Value="STRATEGY" 
Required="false" Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>API versioning strategy: None, QueryString, Header, 
UrlSegment, or Combined.</Description>
        </Option>
      </Parameters>
      <Examples>
        <Example commandLine="generate" />
        <Example commandLine="server" />
        <Example commandLine="-s" />
        <Example commandLine="api.yaml" />
        <Example commandLine="-o" />
        <Example commandLine="output/MyApp.Api.Contracts" />
        <Example commandLine="-n" />
        <Example commandLine="MyApp.Api.Contracts" />
        <Example commandLine="generate" />
        <Example commandLine="server" />
        <Example commandLine="-s" />
        <Example commandLine="api.yaml" />
        <Example commandLine="-o" />
        <Example commandLine="output/MyApp.Api.Contracts" />
        <Example commandLine="-n" />
        <Example commandLine="MyApp.Api.Contracts" />
        <Example commandLine="--no-domain" />
        <Example commandLine="generate" />
        <Example commandLine="server" />
        <Example commandLine="-s" />
        <Example commandLine="api.yaml" />
        <Example commandLine="-o" />
        <Example commandLine="output/MyApp.Api.Contracts" />
        <Example commandLine="-n" />
        <Example commandLine="MyApp.Api.Contracts" />
        <Example commandLine="--versioning-strategy" />
        <Example commandLine="UrlSegment" />
      </Examples>
    </Command>
  </Command>
  <!--OPTIONS-->
  <Command Name="options" IsBranch="true" 
Settings="Spectre.Console.Cli.CommandSettings">
    <Description>Commands for managing ApiGeneratorOptions.json configuration 
files.</Description>
    <!--CREATE-->
    <Command Name="create" IsBranch="false" 
ClrType="Atc.Rest.Api.CliGenerator.Commands.OptionsCreateCommand" 
Settings="Atc.Rest.Api.CliGenerator.Commands.Settings.OptionsCommandSettings">
xmldoc.message:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<Model>
  <!--SPEC-->
  <Command Name="spec" IsBranch="true" 
Settings="Spectre.Console.Cli.CommandSettings">
    <Description>Commands for working with OpenAPI specification 
files.</Description>
    <!--VALIDATE-->
    <Command Name="validate" IsBranch="false" 
ClrType="Atc.Rest.Api.CliGenerator.Commands.SpecValidateCommand" 
Settings="Atc.Rest.Api.CliGenerator.Commands.Settings.SpecValidateCommandSetting
s">
      <Description>Validate an OpenAPI specification file (strict mode by 
default).</Description>
      <Parameters>
        <Option Short="" Long="files" Value="LIST" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Explicit comma-separated list of files to validate as 
multi-part (overrides auto-discovery).</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="multi-part" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Enable multi-part mode: auto-discover and merge part 
files before validation.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="no-strict" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Disable strict validation mode (skip additional naming 
convention checks).</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="s" Long="specification" Value="PATH" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Path to the OpenAPI specification file (YAML or 
JSON).</Description>
        </Option>
      </Parameters>
      <Examples>
        <Example commandLine="spec" />
        <Example commandLine="validate" />
        <Example commandLine="-s" />
        <Example commandLine="api.yaml" />
        <Example commandLine="spec" />
        <Example commandLine="validate" />
        <Example commandLine="-s" />
        <Example commandLine="api.yaml" />
        <Example commandLine="--no-strict" />
        <Example commandLine="spec" />
        <Example commandLine="validate" />
        <Example commandLine="-s" />
        <Example commandLine="api.yaml" />
        <Example commandLine="--multi-part" />
        <Example commandLine="spec" />
        <Example commandLine="validate" />
        <Example commandLine="--files" />
        <Example commandLine="api.yaml,api_Users.yaml,api_Orders.yaml" />
      </Examples>
    </Command>
    <!--MERGE-->
    <Command Name="merge" IsBranch="false" 
ClrType="Atc.Rest.Api.CliGenerator.Commands.SpecMergeCommand" 
Settings="Atc.Rest.Api.CliGenerator.Commands.Settings.SpecMergeCommandSettings">
      <Description>Merge multiple OpenAPI specification files into 
one.</Description>
      <Parameters>
        <Option Short="" Long="files" Value="LIST" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Explicit comma-separated list of files to merge 
(overrides auto-discovery).</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="format" Value="FORMAT" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Output format: yaml (default) or json.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="o" Long="output" Value="PATH" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Output file path for the merged 
specification.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="preview" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Preview merged output without writing file.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="s" Long="specification" Value="PATH" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Path to the base OpenAPI specification file 
(auto-discovers part files by naming convention).</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="strategy" Value="STRATEGY" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Merge strategy for duplicates: ErrorOnDuplicate 
(default), MergeIfIdentical, AppendUnique, FirstWins, LastWins.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="validate" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Validate the merged specification after 
merging.</Description>
        </Option>
      </Parameters>
      <Examples>
        <Example commandLine="spec" />
        <Example commandLine="merge" />
        <Example commandLine="-s" />
        <Example commandLine="api.yaml" />
        <Example commandLine="-o" />
        <Example commandLine="merged.yaml" />
        <Example commandLine="spec" />
        <Example commandLine="merge" />
        <Example commandLine="-s" />
        <Example commandLine="api.yaml" />
        <Example commandLine="-o" />
        <Example commandLine="merged.yaml" />
        <Example commandLine="--validate" />
        <Example commandLine="spec" />
        <Example commandLine="merge" />
        <Example commandLine="--files" />
        <Example commandLine="api.yaml,api_Users.yaml,api_Orders.yaml" />
        <Example commandLine="-o" />
        <Example commandLine="merged.yaml" />
        <Example commandLine="spec" />
        <Example commandLine="merge" />
        <Example commandLine="-s" />
        <Example commandLine="api.yaml" />
        <Example commandLine="--preview" />
      </Examples>
    </Command>
    <!--SPLIT-->
    <Command Name="split" IsBranch="false" 
ClrType="Atc.Rest.Api.CliGenerator.Commands.SpecSplitCommand" 
Settings="Atc.Rest.Api.CliGenerator.Commands.Settings.SpecSplitCommandSettings">
      <Description>Split an OpenAPI specification file into multiple part 
files.</Description>
      <Parameters>
        <Option Short="" Long="extract-common" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Extract shared schemas to a Common file.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="min-operations" Value="N" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.Int32">
          <Description>Minimum operations per part file (smaller groups merged 
into Other).</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="o" Long="output" Value="PATH" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Output directory for the split files.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="pattern" Value="PATTERN" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>File naming pattern. Default: 
{base}_{part}.yaml</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="preview" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Preview split without writing files.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="s" Long="specification" Value="PATH" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Path to the OpenAPI specification file to 
split.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="strategy" Value="STRATEGY" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Split strategy: ByTag (default), ByPathSegment, or 
ByDomain.</Description>
        </Option>
      </Parameters>
      <Examples>
        <Example commandLine="spec" />
        <Example commandLine="split" />
        <Example commandLine="-s" />
        <Example commandLine="api.yaml" />
        <Example commandLine="-o" />
        <Example commandLine="./parts" />
        <Example commandLine="spec" />
        <Example commandLine="split" />
        <Example commandLine="-s" />
        <Example commandLine="api.yaml" />
        <Example commandLine="-o" />
        <Example commandLine="./parts" />
        <Example commandLine="--strategy" />
        <Example commandLine="ByPathSegment" />
        <Example commandLine="spec" />
        <Example commandLine="split" />
        <Example commandLine="-s" />
        <Example commandLine="api.yaml" />
        <Example commandLine="-o" />
        <Example commandLine="./parts" />
        <Example commandLine="--extract-common" />
        <Example commandLine="spec" />
        <Example commandLine="split" />
        <Example commandLine="-s" />
        <Example commandLine="api.yaml" />
        <Example commandLine="--preview" />
      </Examples>
    </Command>
  </Command>
  <!--GENERATE-->

          <Description>Override the host project name (TreeProjects mode 
only).</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="host-ui" Value="TYPE" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>API documentation UI: None, Swagger, or Scalar 
(default).</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="host-ui-mode" Value="MODE" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>When to enable host UI: DevelopmentOnly (default) or 
Always.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="include-deprecated" Value="NULL" Required="false"
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Include deprecated operations and schemas in generated 
code.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="n" Long="name" Value="NAME" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Name of the project (e.g., 
'Demo.Api.Contracts').</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="namespace" Value="NAMESPACE" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Custom namespace prefix for generated code (auto-detected
from project name if not specified).</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="no-coding-rules" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Skip adding ATC coding rules updater files (added by 
default).</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="no-strict" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Disable strict validation mode (skip additional naming 
convention checks).</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="options" Value="PATH" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Path to ApiGeneratorOptions.json file (optional, 
auto-discovered if not specified).</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="o" Long="output" Value="PATH" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Path to the output directory for the generated 
project.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="project-structure" Value="TYPE" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Project structure: SingleProject (1 project), TwoProjects
(Host+Contracts, Domain), or TreeProjects (3 projects, default).</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="report" Value="NULL" Required="false" Kind="flag"
ClrType="System.Boolean">
          <Description>Generate a .generation-report.md file in the output 
directory.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="s" Long="specification" Value="PATH" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Path to the OpenAPI specification file (YAML or 
JSON).</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="stub-implementation" Value="TYPE" 
Required="false" Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Stub implementation type: throw-not-implemented, 
error-501, or default-value.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="sub-folder-strategy" Value="STRATEGY" 
Required="false" Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>Sub-folder organization strategy: None, FirstPathSegment,
or OpenApiTag.</Description>
        </Option>
        <Option Short="" Long="versioning-strategy" Value="STRATEGY" 
Required="false" Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
          <Description>API versioning strategy: None, QueryString, Header, 
UrlSegment, or Combined.</Description>
        </Option>
      </Parameters>
      <Examples>
        <Example commandLine="generate" />
        <Example commandLine="server" />
        <Example commandLine="-s" />
        <Example commandLine="api.yaml" />
        <Example commandLine="-o" />
        <Example commandLine="output/MyApp.Api.Contracts" />
        <Example commandLine="-n" />
        <Example commandLine="MyApp.Api.Contracts" />
        <Example commandLine="generate" />
        <Example commandLine="server" />
        <Example commandLine="-s" />
        <Example commandLine="api.yaml" />
        <Example commandLine="-o" />
        <Example commandLine="output/MyApp.Api.Contracts" />
        <Example commandLine="-n" />
        <Example commandLine="MyApp.Api.Contracts" />
        <Example commandLine="--no-domain" />
        <Example commandLine="generate" />
        <Example commandLine="server" />
        <Example commandLine="-s" />
        <Example commandLine="api.yaml" />
        <Example commandLine="-o" />
        <Example commandLine="output/MyApp.Api.Contracts" />
        <Example commandLine="-n" />
        <Example commandLine="MyApp.Api.Contracts" />
        <Example commandLine="--versioning-strategy" />
        <Example commandLine="UrlSegment" />
      </Examples>
    </Command>
  </Command>
